query: INSERT INTO categories (establishmentId, name, description, sortOrder, isActive) VALUES (210005, 'Chopp', 'Chopps artesanais e importados', 12, 1); SET @cat_chopp = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, sortOrder) VALUES (210005, @cat_chopp, 'Chopp', 'Escolha seu chopp', '0.00', 'active', 1); SET @prod_chopp = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO complementGroups (productId, name, minQuantity, maxQuantity, isRequired, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES (@prod_chopp, 'Escolha seu chopp', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1); SET @grp_chopp = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO complementItems (groupId, name, price, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES (@grp_chopp, 'Heineken 350ml', '18.90', 1, 1), (@grp_chopp, 'IPA 350ml', '19.90', 1, 2), (@grp_chopp, 'Imigração Pilsen 350ml', '17.90', 1, 3), (@grp_chopp, 'Blue Moon 350ml', '19.90', 1, 4);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute INSERT INTO categories (establishmentId, name, description, sortOrder, isActive) VALUES (210005, 'Chopp', 'Chopps artesanais e importados', 12, 1); SET @cat_chopp = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, sortOrder) VALUES (210005, @cat_chopp, 'Chopp', 'Escolha seu chopp', '0.00', 'active', 1); SET @prod_chopp = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO complementGroups (productId, name, minQuantity, maxQuantity, isRequired, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES (@prod_chopp, 'Escolha seu chopp', 1, 1, 1, 1, 1); SET @grp_chopp = LAST_INSERT_ID(); INSERT INTO complementItems (groupId, name, price, isActive, sortOrder) VALUES (@grp_chopp, 'Heineken 350ml', '18.90', 1, 1), (@grp_chopp, 'IPA 350ml', '19.90', 1, 2), (@grp_chopp, 'Imigração Pilsen 350ml', '17.90', 1, 3), (@grp_chopp, 'Blue Moon 350ml', '19.90', 1, 4);
